fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that the direct-debit payment is collected from.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales invoice that the customer leger entry behind this direct-debit collection entry applies to.

fields.name: Transfer Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the payment will be collected from the customer's bank account.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency of the payment amount that is being collected as a direct debit.

fields.name: Transfer Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that will be collected from the customer's bank account.

fields.name: Transaction ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the direct debit collection. It consist of a number in the SEPA direct-debit message number series and the value in the Applies-to Entry No. field.

fields.name: Sequence Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the direct-debit collection entry is the first or the last of a sequence of recurring entries.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the direct-debit collection entry.

fields.name: Mandate ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the direct-debit mandate that exists for the direct debit collection in question.

fields.name: Mandate Type of Payment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the related direct-debit mandate is created for one or multiple direct debit collections.

fields.name: Customer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that the direct-debit payment is collected from.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number on the sales invoice that the customer leger entry behind this direct-debit collection entry applies to.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the sales invoice that the customer leger entry behind this direct-debit collection entry applies to.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the sales invoice that the customer leger entry behind this direct-debit collection entry applies to was posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency of the sales invoice that the customer leger entry behind this direct-debit collection entry applies to.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment amount on the sales invoice that the customer leger entry behind this direct-debit collection entry applies to.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry Rem. Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be paid on the sales invoice that the customer leger entry behind this direct-debit collection entry applies to.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the sales invoice that the customer leger entry behind this direct-debit collection entry applies to is open.
